pageDescription: Control who can see your information and activity
visibilitySectionDescription: Your default visibility for profile, social, and interactions
visibilityModeDescription: Quick switch between preset privacy configurations
customModeHint: Custom settings - select a mode above to reset to presets
profileVisibilityHelper: Who can view your full profile
friendRequestVisibilityHelper: Who can send you friend requests
socialVisibilityHelper: Who can see your social graph presence
friendListVisibilityHelper: Who can see your friend list
onlineStatusVisibilityHelper: Who can see your online status
ssotDefaultsDescription: These settings serve as your default privacy preferences. You can override them when posting or interacting.
